title: Hippolytus: The Destructive Power of Eros
description: Phaedra's forbidden love for her stepson Hippolytus, engineered by Aphrodite, destroys them both.
introduction: Phaedra's forbidden love for her stepson Hippolytus, engineered by Aphrodite, destroys them both.

translation.text: Cyprian, you who rule over the hearts of gods and men — how terrible is your power.
